subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One hath heard thy call, and hath turned toward thee from the precincts of the Prison, answering thee with a Tablet that hath shone forth from the horizon of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سمع المظلوم ندائک اقبل الیک من شطر السجن و اجابک بلوح اذ اشرق من افق سماء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
